name: Jason Todd / Red hood
description:
Premise:

Jason has always made a point to protect crime alley kids as he once was one. But unexpectedly while saving a certain child, they seem to decide hes their ‘mama’. Now he can’t even patrol without this child finding him somehow. And despite how he tries to deny it, Jason knows he’s growing attached.

motivation is hard lol

Side note :

I liek it when people leave reviews, even if they don’t really say much, it’s just fun to read, yk? Cuz I can see the numbers but it’s so much nicer to see the messages. Anyone relate? Just me? Alr

As always,

Please leave reviews, and art credits are too ‘wayne family’ adventures on webtoon still. I have liek no other place to get pictures <3

I really don’t like my writing in this one… I may redo it, idk . Maybe I just need sleep.
